text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 75 

SNF_BENE_PMT 

LABEL: Skilled Nursing Facility Beneficiary Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the sum of Medicare coinsurance and deductible payments in the skilled nursing facility 
(SNF) setting for the year. The total beneficiary payment is calculated as the sum of the beneficiary 
deductible amount and coinsurance amount (variables called NCH_BENE_IP_DDCTBL_AMT and
